chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-577 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of M.A No.1205/2025 3. For hearing of M.A No.1343/2025 4. For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 M/s Muhammad Saleem Hashmi, Advocate for the Petitioners a/w Mr.Zaman Zeb, Advocate Mr.Sikand Ali Soomro, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1, taken on record. ******* Heard learned counsel for the parties. For reasons to be recorded, the instant petition stands dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
